raw_consumer_statement: I have a Best Buy Visa credit card with a {$400.00} credit limit.My account balance shows that I owe {$330.00}. I opened this account back in XX/XX/year>. My transaction was around {$100.00} for one item purchased in-store. I made the payment within the time my first payment was due. The card number I have does not match the one my account shows is active. I do not remember asking for a new card. I do not know if a new card was delivered and used without my consent. I have called the company but I called outside of business hours so I am making the report and will call again when the office is open. I have tried viewing the statements online but the account says it will not show the previous 6 months transactions. I do not know if it is just a problem on my end or if that is how it is appearing. The payments are past due and I can not pay a debt that is not mine. This account is harming my credit and would like for it to be solved.
